subcodes.title: Answer to Navvab-i-Hindi
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath made the ornament of Names at the source of derivation to be the ornament of the Alif of utterance, which was formed through two letters and stood firm in the vessel of the two commands, shining forth from the tablet of creation [3.5s]... ...Verily, that which We sprinkled upon thee out of the ocean of Names and Attributes is due to the sweet melodies of This Bird
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی جعل طراز الاسماء فی مبدء الاشتقاق طراز الف الاستنطاق الذی تکعب بالحرفین و استقام فی ظرفی الامرین الذی لاح عن لوح الابداع
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @names and attributes of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @impossibility of true worship of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
